እንኳን ደሀና መጡ፤ 
 ይግቡ ወይም አዲስ መታወቂያ ይፍጠሩ

-Password must have at least 4 character.en:
-Password must have at least 
 4 characters or no characters for no password
-Password must have at least 4 character.am:
-ቁልፉ ቢያንስ 4 ፊደል ሊኖረው 
 ይገባል ወይም ቁልፍ ካልፈለጉ ባዶውን ይተዉት

-password must contan atleast one 
 number and 3 letters if its not empty
-password must contan atleast one number.am: -ቁልፍ ባዶ ካልሆነ ቢያንስ 1 ቁጥር እና 3 ፊደል ሊኖረው ይገባል
